_provenance.spec: invest ~ value + capital, entity_effects=True, time_effects=True, cov_type=clustered, cluster_entity=True
_provenance.generated_with: linearmodels 6.1 PanelOLS, computed 2026-07-12 via scratchpad venv
_provenance.note: Two-way (entity+time) FE was used, not the textbook one-way FE, because the tool's panel_fe_regression always includes time dummies alongside entity fixed effects (see design_matrix_with_fixed_effects in the pre-migration numpy implementation).

legacy_numpy._note: Captured from the pre-migration numpy_fe_cluster backend before rewriting run_panel_fe. Coefficient matches linearmodels to 1e-9 (unbiased point estimate). std_error and r_squared are the buggy values this migration fixes (B4/B5): r_squared is overstated because it doesn't account for the entity fixed effects consumed as degrees of freedom, and the clustered std_error uses a slightly different small-sample correction.
